textByHash.0050aff4f4a0c594dedc7761e2ac5e4d95bf2f99: Yes, my lady. The meddling adventurer who helped King Arthur in the past.
textByHash.02c5e460b3b36c7af788fbf3f4774bc9b953b818: and it will take you straight into Camelot.
textByHash.0978e1760309290951adee2343bd753551286bb4: You are demanding for a peasant, aren't you. Walk around the edge of Camelot towards the back of the castle. From the hedges, you should be able to see the garden temple. There's a statue back there, if you pull
textByHash.0f353e77fdb2ef1ba1b331046c84bd21538d6c39: It was one of our lazy servants then.
textByHash.119ad9d4df80a2ed2eaf395f47610abb46a2fdd9: You can use it as evidence.
textByHash.137369cb1e8daaa9fd43595750795903a559626a: I didn't! No one will believe me. It was my brother. He set me up.
textByHash.13824bdc59fb8f17696888a9008262738e269fc6: I... I might know how to find them...but I need a favour from you in return.
textByHash.1be742f8d5c2defb34d751ddc37820c31c25be7f: Why thank you. What are we going to do with him now?
textByHash.22edc30b6f6bff0c7e4756479cc71d73ea9bb4a7: In the library. No one else was there so you'll just have to take my word for it.
textByHash.2d3b712dac66c04deb17447f25a46b23816b07d8: Not really, no. Thread is fairly common.
textByHash.328b9c3262478909fbd1ce6b8f5093ed2ed72216: How should I know? I've been locked up here since you stuck your nose into our family's business.
textByHash.366302c6c3a2ac76526c4b1b5cea2b15a2c0d052: No he didn't! He just said he saw me in the room. Why does everyone believe him?
textByHash.405f90b158ee186019607efb23bed2fb4cd38582: That useless Gardener Stanford has let his compost heap fester. It's an eyesore to the garden! So I bought some poison from a travelling salesman so that I could kill off some of the wildlife living in it.
textByHash.53ba2428d74fb9d1d6a21829aa7050f711ea21e5: I don't care if you don't believe me. I know I'm innocent...but I'm also the only one that can show you how to get into Camelot. There's a secret passage that I discovered as a child when we lived there.
textByHash.5851fe5a33c77a880c8f3ecc0ccde5a7f83dd338: Can't you see he framed me? I was the scapegoat so they could all inherit their fortunes and live the good life.
textByHash.5b696d869655043fc83ca63370468a540c391bb0: You see, I told you that adventurer would turn up. He believed my every word.
textByHash.5e5cc4dde9a3c7892f9607b4119268bdeb4fc0c0: the arm a secret entrance will appear. Go inside and it will take you straight into Camelot.
textByHash.6ba04e9a1010a24430f97b1aa890eefcb00726cd: Do you think 'she' would want to see him?
textByHash.7811ab7345c38fdbfbb95b3cc232143477bef1f5: Apparently you aren't as stupid as you look.
textByHash.7996940e8cbf35ede366f2d8ba32236dfb8f959a: Oh really? What do you want to know then?
textByHash.9416f7633573e857750bd403635e48cab1439944: I can't believe you did it. I'm free!
textByHash.ad9baaff3b1b88079512813a7a7b193fb47dae8e: I need a defence lawyer. None of the ones around here will represent me, they all think I'm guilty.
textByHash.b37b37d7429497aa2cd68e136b6c43f1e8bd731b: Shhh. Don't talk about that here! The guards are going to take me back to my cell for paperwork. Meet me there and I'll explain how to get into Camelot.
textByHash.b9a31bc8b720e70f4ec9d16b067050d164c3fdbe: Hmmm...yes, you were that nosy person asking all those questions about daddy's murder.
textByHash.bc7f6626ad538b5c1c0aeb03f7fb31604acb1d1d: No, show it to the servants. You'll find one of my siblings wears similar colours.
textByHash.c32b1fdbd8ff5287f9bcba1c3e13af81f2a2990e: Yes! Exactly. So, what do you say?
textByHash.cb3b505649ab866ddd22fa1f63f920b95e167b82: I have to sign some paper work before I can leave here. Besides, the last thing I want to do is go hang out with my family. I'm sure you can manage this on your own.
textByHash.cf9a178ed96eb9cefb1d084c7d524ce5769ced3f: Enough! I'm sick of having to listen to your drivel.
textByHash.d68dfcb8181c870f2728b45ef4fb1f9a8a25a288: It's forged! I swear, I never touched that dagger or poisoned my father.
textByHash.d8aa48a9f3295b4ba9925c5555489b388bfa5820: Walk around the edge of Camelot towards the back of the castle. From the hedges, you should be able to see the garden temple. There's a statue back there, if you pull the arm a secret entrance will appear. Go inside
textByHash.eda2b227ff94ed4f0160d3959c69a06eb740fa04: Try speaking to the servants at the Mansion. They'll probably be able to give you useful testimony.
textByHash.fd8000cf78c3a7b091288bc5f6b399a7d4b01d8e: I can't believe such an incompetent fool as you managed to prove me innocent.
